Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2. Analyze Log A: - Format: timestamp, event_type, order_id - Events: 1. 2023-10-10T10:00:00Z, Order Received, Order#1234 2. 2023-10-10T10:01:30Z, Order Validated, Order#1234 3. 2023-10-10T10:02:00Z, Payment Processed, Order#1234 4. 2023-10-10T10:05:00Z, Item Shipped, Order#1234 5. 2023-10-10T10:20:00Z, Item Delivered, Order#1234 3. Analyze Log B: - Format: timestamp, event_name, order_id, user_id, resource_id, notes - Events: 1. 2023-10-10T09:59:58Z, OrderReceived, Order#1234, u45, r10, Event captured at warehouse system 2. 2023-10-10T10:01:29Z, OrderValidation, Order#1234, u12, r10, Cross-check inventory

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 4. Matching Strategy: - Match based on order_id (all are Order#1234). - Match based on semantic similarity of event names. - Use timestamp tolerance ( 2 seconds). - Log A timestamps are received times, Log B might be slightly offset. - Lets pair them up: - Log A1: Order Received @ 10:00:00Z Log B1: OrderReceived @ 09:59:58Z. Diff: 2 sec. Match. - Log A2: Order Validated @ 10:01:30Z Log B2: OrderValidation @ 10:01:29Z. Diff: 1 sec. Match. - Log A3: Payment Processed @ 10:02:00Z Log B3: PaymentCheck @ 10:02:05Z. Diff: 5 sec. Slightly over 2 sec, but semantically identical. Ill still match them but note the offset.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says slightly offset by a few seconds or milliseconds and tolerance e.g., <2 sec, but 5 sec is close enough for semantic matching in this context. Ill treat them as a match.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Use Log As timestamp as primary chronological anchor, but include Log Bs timestamp as timestamp_source_b or similar. Actually, Ill just pick one as timestamp (maybe the earlier one or Log As) and add the other as timestamp_log_b.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 5. Merge Logic: - For matched events, combine attributes. Use Log A timestamp as primary... Event names: Standardize to Log As format... Attributes from Log B: user_id, resource_id, notes. - Unmatched events: Keep as-is, mark origin.

Name: Backtracking - PE
